-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

Get Top Stories from The Times.
At our most affordable rate.

99 cents for 12 weeks
Then just $2 a week:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTedYqB81HXJB86GESAAwENca4/sub1

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Life moves fast. Here's the best way to keep up. Try Top 
Stories from The New York Times today and stay up to the minute 
with the latest news and opinion on NYTimes.com and our new 
NYT Now app. 

The best part? You'll pay only $2 a week -- that's a fraction of 
the cost of any other Times subscription. 

With Top Stories, you'll enjoy: 

-- Up to 50 of the Top Stories each day on NYTimes.com, marked 
with green diamonds by our editors

-- Updates whenever news breaks

-- Full access to our new NYT Now app for iPhone(R) featuring our 
daily morning briefing, article summaries, editors' selection of 
great stories from other sources and more.

Act now for this special offer: 99c for 12 weeks. Then, just pay 
$2 a week for the most important stories of the day by the world's 
finest journalists.

99 cents for 12 weeks
Then just $2 a week:
